packageRules.description: Scala version bumps must be human-triggered. Renovate keeps closing these PRs and bumping the Scala stdlib has cross-cutting compiler/library implications that need a coordinated upgrade.

ScalaTest uses -SNAP<n> as a pre-release marker (e.g. 3.3.0-SNAP4) which Renovate's Maven versioning does not recognize as unstable. Restrict to plain X.Y.Z releases so we never get pre-releases or -SNAPSHOT dev builds.
